sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ حَفْلَةَ الزَّفَافِ.
sentences.translationEn: Many people attended the wedding party.

sentences.translation: Mladenka je obukla lijepu bijelu haljinu.
sentences.translationEn: The bride wore a beautiful white dress.

sentences.translation: Muzika je svirala i ljudi su plesali.
Mladoženjina porodica je poslužila hranu gostima.
sentences.translationEn: The groom's family served food to the guests.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الجَمِيعُ سَعِيدًا فِي ذَلِكَ اليَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su bili sretni tog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone was happy on that day.
